chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No.364 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.13648/2024. 02.10.2024 Mr. Imtiaz Hussain Gondal, advocate for the plaintiff. Mr. Muhammad Shoaib (Abidi), advocate for the defendants. 1. Urgency granted. Under instructions, counsel states that plaint may be returned for presentation before the appropriate forum subject to the law. Order accordingly. Plaint is hereby returned. Judge Khuhro/PA
